code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn append_token(_ acc: String, _ v: Int) -> String
  if string.is_empty(acc)
    "#{v}"
  else
    "#{acc} #{v}"
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            evens = append_token(evens, v)
          else
            odds = append_token(odds, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  match string.parse_int(current)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      evens = append_token(evens, v)
    else
      odds = append_token(odds, v)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
